title: TAPE WITNESS
subtitle: The Booth · 2:14 AM · The Truth-Teller's Hour
epigraph_upright: Off-the-books. The truth-teller is already in the booth when Elicia comes back from the kitchenette. She didn't book this session. The reel is half-full of the take she made before this all started.
epigraph_reversed: The truth-teller leaves mid-sentence. The apologist's tape gets stepped on. The reel runs out before any of it is on tape. Tomorrow morning Elicia listens back and there is nothing there that was true.
scene_description: 2:14 AM. The booth's red record-light is already on. The truth-teller is in the booth, sitting, not talking yet. The reel is at 3/6 from earlier tonight. Doubt at 2 — the booth feels off-axis, like the room is recording itself. Two more visitors coming in by appointment. Elicia is going to need her ability tonight.
direction_hint: Get the truth-teller through their take. Don't let the apologist leave. Land the returner's third visit. Reel cannot fill.
opening_log_lines: the booth's red record-light is on. the truth-teller is in there.
the reel is at three out of six. you have been recording without knowing.
2:14 AM. the cathedral is dark on the other side.

stagnation_thresholds.label: the truth left the room without being recorded.

doubt_thresholds.label: she is not sure she's the one in the engineer's chair.
the listener breaks. the booth wins.

notes: Hard-mode Priestess. 2:14 AM, off-the-books. Truth-teller already in the booth at session start. Reel starts at 3, doubt at 2, stagnation at 2. THE LONG QUIET ability card is in hand from start. Requires 5 connections + 3 hard moods + leap; 8-turn limit. Brutal.
ambient_pool: 2:14 AM. the cicadas are gone. the booth has only its own quiet.
the truth-teller is still in the booth, still sitting, still about to say it.
the reel turns. you can hear it.
the cathedral on the other side is dark. it doesn't know you're awake.
